body.title: Reading session completion status — Igor cannot query reading progress
body.result: Already implemented in commit e580b4fc — book_learner deposits READING_<hash> EPISODIC node after each run. Status was erroneously reset to pending by daemon timeout; work is live.
body.description: Igor has no reliable way to determine whether a book reading session completed, how far it progressed, or whether corpus was fully deposited. Observed: Igor asked 'did you finish Making Money?' and could not answer. Fix: reader/drain_runner writes a completion record per book (book_id, total_chunks, chunks_processed, status=complete/partial/failed, timestamp) as a memory node (EPISODIC, scope=instance) after each book finishes. Node must be retrievable via normal context search so Igor can answer 'did I finish X?' without human assistance.
